criteria.description: Task 6 no longer exposes any LBTI lobster persona copy and now closes the journey with an Agent SBTI result.
criteria.notes: The regression suite now asserts that Task 6 is branded as Agent SBTI, known inputs resolve to a stable SBTI badge, unknown inputs degrade gracefully, and the rendered page no longer leaks the LBTI term.

criteria.description: Task 6 consumes the current SBTI input instead of a random lobster seed, while preserving the rest of the Task 1-5 flow.
criteria.notes: The new resolver maps the current SBTI input into Task 6 content, supports placeholder and unknown-code fallback states, and leaves the seeded coordinate / resonance / faction flow intact.

criteria.description: Mission 011 remains buildable and both work packages are recorded as done after the direct-repo review/accept flow.
criteria.notes: The production build passed after replacing the Task 6 data model, and WP01/WP02 are materialized in the done lane with a direct-repo done override.
